videos.headline: Georgia Tech Yellow Jackets vs. Colorado Buffaloes: Full Highlights
videos.description: Georgia Tech Yellow Jackets vs. Colorado Buffaloes: Full Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia Tech Yellow Jackets vs. Colorado Buffaloes: Full Highlights) 2025/08/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kaidon Salter leads an opening drive TD for Colorado
videos.description: Kaidon Salter tosses an 8-yard touchdown pass to Dekalon Taylor in his first drive as Colorado quarterback.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kaidon Salter leads an opening drive TD for Colorado) 2025/08/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: DJ McKinney comes up with an INT for Colorado
videos.description: Haynes King throws an errant pass and DJ McKinney picks it off for Georgia Tech's third turnover of the first quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (DJ McKinney comes up with an INT for Colorado) 2025/08/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Haynes King powers his way into the end zone
videos.description: Haynes King gives Georgia Tech its first lead of the game with a 4-yard rushing touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Haynes King powers his way into the end zone) 2025/08/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Coach Prime animated on the sideline during a timeout
videos.description: Coach Prime is fired up on the sideline talking to his coaches and players.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Coach Prime animated on the sideline during a timeout) 2025/08/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Haynes King keeps it for his 2nd rushing TD
videos.description: Haynes King goes untouched into the end zone to give the Yellow Jackets a 20-13 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Haynes King keeps it for his 2nd rushing TD) 2025/08/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kaidon Salter brings Colorado level with a rushing TD
videos.description: Kaidon Salter sees nothing downfield and takes it himself into the end zone for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kaidon Salter brings Colorado level with a rushing TD) 2025/08/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Colorado crowd causes back-to-back false starts
videos.description:
Colorado crowd causes back-to-back false starts 
The Colorado crowd is so loud that Georgia Tech has back-to-back false starts.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Colorado crowd causes back-to-back false starts ) 2025/08/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Haynes King's 3rd rushing TD gives Georgia Tech a lead with 68 seconds left
videos.description: Haynes King gets great blocking and rushes for a 45-yard rushing touchdown late in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Haynes King's 3rd rushing TD gives Georgia Tech a lead with 68 seconds left) 2025/08/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Colorado's Hail Mary attempt falls incomplete as Georgia Tech holds on
videos.description: Kaidon Salter throws it up in the end zone, and Georgia Tech defenders swat it down to secure the victory.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Colorado's Hail Mary attempt falls incomplete as Georgia Tech holds on) 2025/08/30 ESHEET
